proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same Queensboro Bridge Bus Priority Study project. Record project_qbb-bus-priority-study (source: 201110_qbb_summary_recommendations, status: completed) and record project_queensboro-bridge-bus-priority-study (source: 201110_qbb_approach_summary, status: ongoing) share the same project name, same boroughs (Manhattan/Queens), and substantially identical descriptions about improving bus speed and reliability on the QBB. The former even carries the latter's record_id as an alias. They represent the same real-world study captured from two different source documents.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Identify cost-effective ways to improve bus speed and reliability for local and express buses that use the QBB.

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'project_queensboro-bridge-bus-priority-study' already exists in the registry and matches this observation — same source (201110_qbb_approach_summary), same project name, same boroughs, same description. The observation already resolves to this canonical record ID; no re-linking is needed (new decision). Additionally, registry record 'project_qbb-bus-priority-study' is clearly the same real-world project (same name, same geography, same purpose) captured from a companion source document (summary recommendations vs. approach summary), and should be linked.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Identify cost-effective ways to improve bus speed and reliability for local and express buses that use the QBB.
